theme_and_archetype.domain: Enterprise SaaS / Developer Tooling / Mainframe Modernization
theme_and_archetype.rationale: For mainframe modernization, a dark 'terminal-inspired' aesthetic bridges the legacy of COBOL with modern cloud infrastructure. By combining stark, high-contrast structural borders with mono typography, we evoke nostalgia without sacrificing the precision of a high-end developer tool like Linear or Datadog.

rules: Uppercase and heavy letter-spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) for all small labels and table headers.
Use mono fonts specifically for all COBOL code, PIC clauses, and data types.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, structured, highly scannable.

dashboard_cards.style: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow.
dashboard_cards.hover: Border color shifts to emerald-500/50, subtle background tint (bg-zinc-900/50).

terminal_console.style: Retro-Futurism. Deep black background, phosphor green text for logs, scanline background overlay pattern.

glass_overlays.style: Crystal Glass for sticky headers or modals. bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.

component_instructions.sidebar: Fixed width, dark zinc background (bg-zinc-950), right border border-white/10. Mono font for links. Active link has left green border (border-l-2 border-emerald-500) and white text.
component_instructions.dashboard_hero: Span full width. Deep black background with subtle grid texture image. High-contrast typography showcasing system status.
component_instructions.stats_cards: Use 'Control Room' grid layout. Large mono numbers (text-4xl), small uppercase labels (text-xs).
component_instructions.cobol_parser: Use Shadcn Table. Dense styling. Header background bg-zinc-900. Zebra striping for rows. Mono font for 'Data Type' and 'PIC' columns. Include a drag-and-drop zone using dashed borders (border-white/20).
component_instructions.schema_mapper: Two side-by-side lists. Left: COBOL Source, Right: Target Cloud DB. Use absolute positioned SVG lines or custom 'diff' styling (green background tint for new/mapped fields) to connect them visually.
component_instructions.migration_pipeline: Stepper component to show stages (Extract -> Parse -> Map -> Convert -> Load). Include a simulated terminal window (bg-black text-emerald-500 font-mono) showing real-time EBCDIC to ASCII conversion logs.
component_instructions.data_validation: Use Shadcn Tabs for Rules vs Anomalies. Gauge chart (recharts) for Quality Score. Audit log in a dense table format.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary: Flat bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-500. Secondary: Flat border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800.
component_instructions.data_testids: Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, row actions) have descriptive data-testid attributes.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp, instantaneous color transitions. No bouncy scaling. Focus states must have high-contrast ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in for data grids (staggered entrance).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Terminal-style blinking cursor or ASCII-style progress bars instead of standard spinners.

dashboard_hero_bg.description: Abstract technical grid pattern for hero section background overlay (use with heavy black opacity like bg-black/80).

code_texture.description: Programming code overlay for parser/mapper empty states or login screens.
code_texture.placement: Empty state backgrounds or decorative accents
